calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-16-2010 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-01-2010 Continued To Feb-16-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Granting Family Allowance
Off Calendar Mar-11-2009 Advanced From Apr-01-09 To Mar-11-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Granting Family Allowance
Off Calendar Mar-16-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Harbour and Alexis Donoghoe for William Letsinger (Administrator).

Mr. Harbour stated that Ryan did not have a permanent residence, that he was staying in Hotels and with his Mother in Santa Cruz, that William was in contact with Ryan every two to three days and that they had attempted to get the waiver signed. In addition, he informed the Court that the Decedent was a Beneficiary of another pending estate which would also go to Ryan. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: Raymond Arata. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

Petition For Order Granting Family Allowance
Off Calendar Mar-11-2009 Continued To Mar-16-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Ex Parte Petition And Application For Order Shortening Time And Advancing The Date Of Scheduled Hearing
Off Calendar Feb-19-2009 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-28-2009 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-17-2008 Continued To Jan-28-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Ex Parte Petition For Appointment Of Special Administrator, Ex Parte
Off Calendar Nov-03-2008 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-15-2008 Continued To Dec-17-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Harbour and Alexis Donoghoe (Law Clerk) for William Letsinger. Janathan Ferdon for the San Francisco Public Administrator.

This matter was also on for the Ex Parte Petition For Appointment of Guardian Ad Litem for Ryan Letsinger (Decedent's Son).

The Court informed the Parties that the manner in which to proceed was to have William (Decedent's Brother) file an ex parte petition for appointment as Special Adminstrator with limited powers and file a petition for conservatorship of Ryan (Nephew). The matter was continued to December 17, 2008.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Karen Farnsworth, CSR#5162. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy D. Wong.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-01-2008 Continued To Oct-15-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
